indication: KEYTRUDA (pembrolizumab) is indicated as monotherapy for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients with unresectable or metastatic microsatellite instability-high (MSI-H) or mismatch repair deficient (dMMR) solid tumours, as determined by a validated test, that have progressed following prior treatment and who have no satisfactory alternative treatment options.
raw_cancer_type: unresectable or metastatic MSI-H or dMMR solid tumors

document.name: Keytruda (pembrolizumab) [product monograph]. HC.
